articles.title: Two Lebanese paramedics wounded in landmine explosion
articles.summary: Two Lebanese paramedics wounded in landmine explosion The Lebanese Red Cross said on Tuesday that one of its ambulances was hit by a landmine explosion while conducting a rescue mission in the Zawtar al-Sharqiya area, damaging the ambulance and injuring two paramedics.
